How to use

Camera

Drag to look around (camera stays put). Scroll to dolly forward / backward.

Keyboard

W A S D fly · Space / Shift up / down · double-tap W to sprint.

Interaction

Click a voxel to read its combo. Drag any model-name tag or callout card to reposition it. Drag the Help panel header to move it; click the ▾ button to collapse.

Paper shot export

The "Paper" buttons render at 3× DPR with a white background, hidden UI, a 2D colorbar, and stage chips. The PDF variant keeps all overlay text as vector. Enable "iso camera" for a reproducible isometric angle. Exported figures are rendered in English regardless of the UI language.

Help & controls
Axes sorted by descending marginal UJ-H (index 0 = best).
Drag = look (camera stays put) · scroll = dolly forward/back · WASD fly · Space/Shift up/down · double-tap W to sprint · click a voxel for its combo.
Fly through the UJ-H colorbar from light to deep for a surprise.
